## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `./gradlew build` passes locally (includes Spotless formatting)
- [ ] API changes made spec-first: `openapi/yapilayer-api.yaml` edited and `./scripts/generate-sdk.sh` output committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (docs site in `docs/`, or ADR where a significant decision was made)
- [ ] No provider-specific logic added to `platform/*` modules
- [ ] No secrets, certificates or credentials in the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-visible
